SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ROBERT NATHAN JOHNSON--OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LINDELE CONSTRUCTION CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PASTA POMODORO, INC. $2,247.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,312.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PASTA POMODORO, INC.
